title: SSE buffer normalize is O(n) per chunk — O(n²) total
description: client.rs subscribe_events: on every received network chunk the entire accumulated buffer is passed through two String::replace calls (normalize CRLF), each O(buffer_length). With a large frame arriving in many small chunks this is O(total_bytes * num_chunks) work — quadratic in total data received. Fix: normalize only the newly appended bytes, or use a state machine that tracks whether the last char was CR and patches in-place.
